headline: NVIDIA Expands AI Infrastructure From Utility Scale Builds To Homes
summary: NVIDIA (NasdaqGS:NVDA) and IREN Limited agreed to deploy up to 5 gigawatts of next generation AI infrastructure. NVIDIA also partnered with Span and PulteGroup to create distributed fractional data centers that use residential grid capacity for AI workloads. These partnerships expand NVIDIA's reach across large scale facilities and more distributed, community level compute nodes. NVIDIA, traded on NasdaqGS:NVDA, is a central supplier of GPUs and software that power many AI data centers and...
